raw_consumer_statement: Barclays is charging me XXXX for charges they did not pay to a vendor XXXX XXXX XXXX. The vendor is stating that Barclays only paid them {$2300.00} and the other {$5800.00} has not been paid. I need evidence that Barclays in fact did pay XXXX the other {$5800.00}. XXXX also has agreed in multiple emails that they have paid over paid {$8100.00} but Barclays refuses to take my call or respond to emails. Barclays is a horrific company and their Office of the PresidenXXXX should be ashamed for the way they treat customers.
